Allotment of 6,88,800 equity shares of face value Rs.5/- (Rupees Five Only) each, fully paid-up, upon conversion of an equivalent number of warrants at an issue price of Rs.412/- (Rupees Four Hundred and Twelve Only) per share, including a premium of Rs.407/- (Rupees Four Hundred and Seven Only) per share, on a preferential basis. The allotment was made upon receipt of the balance consideration amount aggregating to Rs.21,28,39,200/- (Rupees Twenty-One Crore Twenty-Eight Lakh Thirty-Nine Thousand Two Hundred Only), representing 75% of the total issue price, in accordance with the provisions of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018 (SEBI ICDR Regulations).
